title: Certificate course in Forensic photography
content: The Certificate Course in Forensic Photography trains professionals in capturing precise, high-quality images of crime scenes and evidence. Covering techniques like macro photography, UV/IR imaging, and 3D reconstruction, it enhances documentation skills for law enforcement, forensic experts, and legal teams, ensuring accurate visual evidence for investigations and court proceedings. Pass in Class XII 01 Introduce the fundamentals and advanced techniques of forensic photography. 02 Train learners in the photographic documentation of various types of crime scenes and evidence. 03 Equip participants with skills to maintain photographic integrity for court admissibility. 04 Explore digital imaging, enhancement, and ethical handling of photographic evidence. 01 Master technical and legal aspects of forensic photography. 02 Be equipped to photographically document a wide range of crime scenes and evidence. 03 Understand the role of image integrity and proper handling in forensic investigation. 04 Be eligible to support law enforcement, forensic labs, and legal agencies with professional-grade photographic documentation.
